# MusicVideos.Views.MusicVideosMoreByArtistView

**Object**

A relationship view from this music video to more music videos of various types by the artist.

## Declaration

```swift
object MusicVideos.Views.MusicVideosMoreByArtistView
```

## Related Objects

- **MusicVideos.Views.MusicVideosMoreByArtistView.Attributes**: More content of some other type by the artist.

## Related Objects

- **MusicVideos.Views.MusicVideosMoreInGenreView**: A relationship view from this music video to more music videos in a specific music video genre.
